case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. SANTOS SAUL ARGUETA PINEDA

docket_entries.description: LENIA RODRIGUEZ APPEARS ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. THE PLAINTIFF REQUESTS AND THE COURT ORDERS A DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,708.45 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT ARGUETA PINEDA, SANTOS SAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED JAN-16-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARGUETA PINEDA, SANTOS SAUL
